name: Mountain Mulligans
address: 1450 E White Mountain Blvd Suite H-I, Pinetop, AZ 85935
about: Mountain Mulligans is an indoor golf simulator venue in Pinetop, AZ, offering year-round play with two high-tech Uneekor simulators. The facility provides a relaxed atmosphere with two semi-private bays, seating for four, and top-quality equipment, allowing golfers to play on over 250 world-renowned courses. They offer memberships with tiered hourly packages (Par, Birdie, Albatross) starting at $29.99/month, as well as public access at $30-$45/hour, all booked through an online system.
why_golfers_like_it: Two state-of-the-art Uneekor simulators with precise ball tracking
Over 250 world-renowned courses available to play
Relaxed atmosphere with comfortable semi-private bays
Flexible monthly memberships with no long-term commitments

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB likely allowed
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB likely allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Uneekor simulators with precise ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or top-quality equipment is provided at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility appears to allow BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages), but no food service is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole rounds typically take 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Mountain Mulligans kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes juniors, with special programs for student athletes.
